hook: Good conversation usually wins through pacing, not perfect lines.
body: Attraction builds when curiosity, humor, tension, and sincerity take turns instead of all arriving at once.

hook: Many men keep stacking clever messages because they think constant novelty equals chemistry.
body: A better goal is to create an easy rhythm where the other person has room to respond, add, and invest.

hook: A better goal is to create an easy rhythm where the other person has room to respond, add, and invest.
body: A short observation followed by one specific question often lands better than a paragraph trying to impress.

hook: A short observation followed by one specific question often lands better than a paragraph trying to impress.
body: Before sending a message, cut one sentence and keep only the part that invites a real reply.
